events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: AAV where prohibited. Air admittance valve installed in heavy industrial site where prohibited. Work rough-complete. Condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? AAV prohibited in industrial? Could be medium/high. Need findings: AAV installed in location where prohibited by code/engineering/spec. Actions: remove AAV, install proper vent per IPC/UPC and engineered drawings, extend vent to atmosphere. References: IPC/UPC venting requirements, AAV limitations. Need fill all fields. percent_complete maybe 80. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty. workable empty. confidence 0.95. event_time 0. rate 0. Let's craft JSON.
